short_term.title: Short-term view (0–30 days · next earnings cycle)
bullets: Run-rate $1.65B in FY2026 Q1, +16.8% YoY — accelerating trajectory entering the next print.
Next-quarter consensus: $1.45B (-12.1% vs current Q) — set by 34 broker contributors.
EPS consensus next qtr: $0.15.
Next earnings: 2026-08-07 — primary catalyst for the short-term window.
short_term.takeaway: Going into the next earnings print, the setup is mixed — execution risk on the next guide is elevated.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ days · multi-year setup)
bullets: TTM revenue $6B — in cyclical drawdown.
Sell-side: FY1 $6B → FY2 $7B (+18.1% multi-year top-line implied).
Forward EBIT margin: 14.0% — average operating profile over the long-cycle view.
7-quarter run-rate CAGR: -98.7% — the secular trajectory the market is pricing.
Sector thesis (Consumer Discretionary): Premiumization vs trade-down split — the long-run thesis depends on cohort mix.
long_term.takeaway: Long-cycle thesis is intact if the next 2–4 quarters confirm a stabilization in trajectory.

short_term.title: Short-term view (0–30 days · trading window)

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ days · positioning window)
bullets: Price $25.12 vs SMA200 $31.69 (-20.7%) — long-term trend is in **downtrend**.
Moving average regime: Death cross active (SMA50 < SMA200) — institutional trend filter bearish.
1-year return: -29.3% — in distribution.

90-day return: +6.9% — positive intermediate-term momentum.
long_term.takeaway: Long-term positioning: distribute on strength — trend has rolled over.

short_term.title: Short-term view (0–45 DTE · front-month tactical)
bullets: Front-month ATM IV: 116.7% — extreme (binary-event hedging implied).
Put/Call OI: 0.52 — call-heavy positioning (consensus bullish).
30-day implied move: ±11.8% ($22.16 – $28.08) — the 1-σ range the options market is pricing.
ATM skew: -45.54pp — call skew (upside bid — bullish positioning).
Front-month OI cluster: $25.5 — likely magnet / pin-risk for expiry.
short_term.strategy: Iron condor 30 DTE: short $24 put / short $26 call (wings 5% wide). Range-bound + high IV → premium-selling with capped risk both sides.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ DTE · LEAPS / structural)
bullets: Back-month avg IV (90+ DTE): 55.2% across 8 expiries.
Available long-dated expiries: 8 dates spanning 91–609 DTE.
90-day implied move: ±26.0% ($18.59 – $31.65).
391-day implied move: ±58.6% ($10.39 – $39.85) — the long-dated 1-σ range.
Sell-side PT vs options-implied range: consensus $35 (+39.3% upside). Compare to the 90+ DTE implied range above.
Term structure in backwardation (-61.5pp front→back) — near-term event premium; long-dated vol cheaper.
long_term.strategy: Sell 6-month strangle: short $23 put / short $28 call. Range-bound + high IV → premium-selling on both sides; profits if spot stays within ±10%; manage with rolls or assignment.
